detail: Scale (Escalar) is always permanent per §8. Duration 'next-attack' contradicts rules. Changed to permanent.
Non-negation restriction is permanent and mandatory. Removed optional:true from modifiers.
Effect text says 'Protege' which per §14 means full immunity to attacks AND effects. Changed protect-attack → protect-full.
Missing sub-effect: after sending enemy Adendei to bottom of deck, rival's drawn card must be placed into rival's Zona Principal.
Effect text says source can be 'campo/Mazo'. Added 'deck' as valid source zone alongside 'field' for Espectro swap.
Cards cannot receive descansos beyond max 2 for Adendei. Added prerequisite: target must have current rest < 2.
Effect text explicitly states equipment returns to Zona de Equipo. Added destination:'equip-zone' to unequip-all operation.
Temporary +1 damage for the turn only. scale is permanent per §8. Changed to damage-bonus with duration:turn.
Effect text says 'no puede activar efectos' (all types including Activas-Rápidas and Pasivas-Rápidas). Changed scope.
Effect text says 'puedes dañar' — optional. Added optional:true to modifiers.
'Ningún Adendei puede ser curado' is a permanent mandatory restriction. Removed optional:true.
'Gasta 6 puntos' = Cyra loses 6 PV as cost. Added self-damage cost entry for Cyra. Ally heal operation remains.
Per §12, cards changed between zones keep their stats. Added stat_preservation:true.
§13 rule 3: rival cards cannot go to your Mazo/Extinción. Documented as explicit restriction flag.
Effect in bold — mandatory Pasiva. Removed optional:true.
No 'puede' in effect text — mandatory Pasiva, not Pasiva Opcional. Removed optional:true.
Condition = 'rival has 0 tokens' = fewer than 1. Changed operator eq:0 → lt:1 for precision.
Duration is until end of next turn after the turn equipped. Changed from generic 'next-turn' to anchored 'next-turn-from-equip'.
'Cura hasta 6 puntos' = variable up to 6. Changed fixed value:6 → max:6.
P1 prerequisite should only check protector-available. Titán condition belongs to P2 (entry penalty), not P1.
Effect returns Ixim FROM Zona Principal TO Zona de Equipo (inverse direction). Changed equip-from-equip-zone → return-to-equip-zone with source:principal.
'Puede curar hasta 6 puntos' = variable. Changed value:6 → max:6.
Pasiva Opcional ('puedes mostrarla'). Added optional:true.
First attack can be applied to protected Adendei (ignores protection). Added bypass-protection:true scoped to first-attack.
no-rest = no cooldown after attack. cant-receive-rests-by-effect = immunity to rests granted by effects. These are distinct mechanics. Changed to correct type.
Added explicit restrict field so engine knows the specific action blocked is returning equipment to Equipment Zone.
Separated targets: enemy receives rest-add:2, ally card receives rest-remove:2. Old 'both' target was ambiguous.
Formula: damage × 2 × pending_rests_at_end_of_turn. Changed to multiply-damage with explicit multipliers to remove ambiguity.
operation[] was empty. Added prevent-hide operation for both players in Zona Principal.
Text says 'hasta el final de TU siguiente turno'. Changed ambiguous 'next-turn' to 'until-end-of-next-own-turn'.
operation[] was empty. cant-heal must be applied to attacked target as operation, not just as self-restriction on Ariam.
Per §10.2 canonical type = Activa-Rápida. Changed promote-to-fast → promote-to-activa-rapida with duration:current-turn and scope:all-activa-effects.
Numeric values confirmed correct: cost.value:1, operation.value:2. No fix needed.
'dañan 1 pto. ADICIONAL' = Daño Adicional §9, not permanent Escalar §8. Changed scale → bonus-attack-damage with burn condition.
Only heal-triggered removal is blocked. Other removal methods still work. Changed mark-persist → block-mark-removal via:heal.
'dañan 1 pto. adicional' = Daño Adicional §9, not Escalar §8. Changed scale → bonus-attack-damage with condition target-has-rests.
'Aumenta 1 pto. de daño' = permanent Escalar §8. pipeline.scale is correct. Flagged for confirmation only.
Missing: player choice step, damage from chosen card's stat, all 3 returned to bottom. Replaced single vague operation with 4-step sequence.

new_value: REVIEW: Ambiguous between permanent scale-per (Húumico archetype) and per-attack bonus-per. If permanent: keep scale-per, add trigger:on-ally-extinction filter:abisal. If per-attack: change to damage-bonus-per. Conservative: keep scale-per.
detail: Flagged for human review. Two valid interpretations exist (§8 permanent vs §9 per-attack). Conservative approach keeps current type.
Numeric value confirmed: operation.value:1 matches 'dana 1 punto'. No fix needed.
No 'puede' in effect text — mandatory on reveal. Removed optional:true.
'Esta carta' = the Protector itself. Normalized label to until-self-available.
Pre-declaration restriction, not post-declaration negation. Changed negate-effect → restrict-activation with scope:equip-cards.
Continuous aura Pasiva is mandatory, not Pasiva Opcional. Removed optional:true.
scale is permanent. Conditional attack bonus when self has burn. Changed to damage-bonus with on-attack + has-mark:burn condition.
protect-effect implies full effect immunity. Effect only grants immunity to DAMAGE. Changed to damage-immunity with duration:next-turn.
'atacar adicionalmente' = daño por ataque §9, not daño por efecto. Changed to attack-additional.

new_value: Card text missing 'vivificar' keyword. Per §15, vivify requires explicit text. Flag for card text review.
detail: Per §15, vivify requires explicit 'vivificar' text. Card text gap — flag for review and card text update.
Responds to opponent's reveal = Pasiva-Rápida per §10.4. Added fast:true to trigger.
'dana 1 punto adicional' = Daño Adicional §9 on triggering attack. Changed amplify-effect → damage-additional.
Token placed 'antes de colocar la carta suplente'. Added modifiers.timing:before-replacement.
Action is returning Rot to Zona de Equipo, not equipping from it. Changed direction.
Token copies damage, rest, Activa, cost but NOT max_life or subtype. Added explicit copy_fields.
Explicitly exclude vida máxima and subtipo from copy per §2.7 Token defaults.

new_value: Token-Lítico energy 'litica' is a special exception to §2.7 (Tokens have no energy by default). Flag for energy-filter effects.
detail: Documented Token-Lítico energy exception. energy_override:litica overrides §2.7 default — note for engine.
cost_text says 'no puedes vincular'. cant-use-activa-while-active doesn't cover Vínculo Odémico. Added cant-link-this-turn restriction.
Effect places suplente FROM Mazo — standard replacement, not vivification from Extinción. Changed vivify → place-from-deck.
'+1 daño adicional al atacar' = Daño Adicional per attack, not permanent Escalar. Changed scale → damage-additional with duration:while-equipped.
Effect places card 'fuera del juego' (out of game), NOT Extinción. Distinct zones. Changed send-extinction → send-out-of-game.
Kept zone:out-of-game to distinguish from extinction zone. No change to zone value, only operation type corrected.
Send 1 Ixim to Extinción is a cost, not a free operation. Moved send-extinction to costs array.
Removed
